title: UPSC – Manager, Assistant Controller and More – 194 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UPSC Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 194 Manager, Assistant Controller and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The UPSC has released 194 Manager, Assistant Controller and More vacancies. Eligible candidates with B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, M.A, M.Sc, M.E/M.Tech, PG Diploma can apply online on or before June 12, 2026, at upsc.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), New Delhi
basic_details.post_name: Airworthiness Officer (DGCA), Deputy Controller of Explosive (PESO), Manager (Mail Motor Service), Junior Technical Officer (Sugar & Veg Oils), Junior Technical Officer (Chemical Engineering), Scientific Officer (Mechanical), Deputy Superintending Archaeological Engineer (ASI), Associate Professor Electrical Engineering (CME Pune), Associate Professor Mechanical Engineering (CME Pune), Lecturer Persian Language (SFL), Lecturer Tibetan Language (SFL), Scientist-B (Atmospheric Sciences / General Meteorology / Instrumentation) (IMD), Deputy Director Civil Engineering (CICEF), Joint Assistant Director (Directorate of Coordination Police Wireless), Assistant Executive Engineer (CGWB), Deputy Director of Mines Safety (Mining), Assistant Director Grade-I/Grade-II (IEDS Chemical) (MSME), and other posts
basic_details.job_type: Permanent Central Government Service - Group A & Group B Gazetted, Non-Ministerial (varies by post)

age_limit.age_details: Master's degree in Tibetan Language from a recognized University/Institution

qualification.education_qualification: Candidates claiming equivalent qualifications must produce order/letter indicating the Authority (with number and date) under which it has been treated as equivalent; otherwise the application will be rejected.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 7 to Level 13A1 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix (varies by post)

selection_process: Recruitment by Selection (Interview / Recruitment Test followed by Interview - as decided by UPSC post-wise)
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only at https://upsconline.nic.in/ora/. The UPSC online portal has four modules: Account Creation, Universal Registration (URN), Common Application Form (CAF), and Post/Vacancy-specific module. The first three modules can be filled at any time; the fourth (vacancy-specific) module must be filled during the application window. Candidates who have already registered and have a URN can directly log in and fill the vacancy-specific module. Candidates are strongly advised to use Aadhaar Card as the ID document for seamless verification. Applications once submitted are final - no correction/alteration/modification is permitted after submission. Candidates must take a printout of the finally submitted application and carry it along with original documents if called for interview.
